messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: Kapil Verma (SEBI REGISTERED RA)

text.text: New Year 2026 – My Advice to All Members
Option Buying:

text:
Do not be aggressive. Stay disciplined.
Nearly 90% of traders lose money because they don’t follow stop-loss rules.
Option buying requires strict discipline, proper stop-loss, and patience.
Without discipline, profits are not sustainable.

👉

text.text: For Small Traders:

text:
Always book small, consistent profits as per your capital and risk capacity.
For example, if your maximum risk is ₹2,000, aim to book ₹2,000 profit as well.
Grow slowly and steadily increase your confidence first, then your capital.

👉

text.text: For Option Sellers (Bigger Capital):

text:
I am starting positional option selling strategies focused on
risk management and consistent gains, not shortcuts.

text.text: 🎯 Focus in 2026: Capital protection, discipline, and consistency.

text_entities.text: New Year 2026 – My Advice to All Members
Option Buying:

Do not be aggressive. Stay disciplined.
Nearly 90% of traders lose money because they don’t follow stop-loss rules.
Option buying requires strict discipline, proper stop-loss, and patience.
Without discipline, profits are not sustainable.

👉
For Small Traders:

Always book small, consistent profits as per your capital and risk capacity.
For example, if your maximum risk is ₹2,000, aim to book ₹2,000 profit as well.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

text_entities.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE

👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions.

text.text:
Excellent day for option buyers

For those who are confused about index option buying levels repeated option levels are given to minimize losses, because the market is showing wild moves on both sides and volatility in index options is very high.
Till the Budget, only those traders who can execute trades quickly and decisively, especially in index intraday trading, should participate.
Other traders may avoid index trading such as Bank Nifty, Nifty, and Sensex to manage risk better.

messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE

messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

text_entities.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

Yesterday, we carried only one BTST position.
Now, Monday is expected to open with a big gap up 

 bad luck.

messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

text.text:
I believe in booking only 4,000+ profit in option buying levels.Safe traders should continue to book 1500–2000 profit from their end as per their comfort.

Going forward, I will not post messages to book 1500–2500 profit.
When such messages are posted, safe traders exit early, but for bigger capital traders this becomes negative, because early profit booking breaks the option’s momentum.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

text_entities.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

text.text:
Market Behaviour

Yesterday, Nifty fell nearly 400 points without any major reason, and today it recovered around 200 points. This clearly shows that only the index is moving sharply, while the broader market remains weak.
Most stocks are still in corrective mode. Except for a few selective names, the majority of stocks are closing in flat to red.
Option buyers need to stay extremely alert near Monthly Expiry. Volatility can increase, and sudden moves are common. However, it is also true that near expiry, some high-reward (jackpot) option buying setups do appear.
Next week, trades will be taken only in such high-probability expiry setups, with strict risk management.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE

NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE

NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note:

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

text.text:
As per the poll:

If 41% of members are not exiting cost-to-cost or low-performing options, then exits have no real meaning.

This is a mistake from that 41% of members.
Nothing works 100% in the market.

If an option loses momentum, it’s important to exit and look for better opportunities.

So please make sure to follow this discipline.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

text_entities.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

text.text:
Friday’s BTST positions opened with a gap down, and most of them either hit stop loss or closed below it.

For tomorrow, a strong gap-up opening is possible in BTST names like BSE Ltd and MCX.

In the current environment of war-related news and overall high market volatility, carrying overnight positions is extremely risky.

We are seeing sharp gap-up and gap-down moves, which means outcomes are becoming binary  either big profit or big loss.

So in this kind of market: 👉 BTST exposure needs extra caution

👉 Risk management is more important than conviction

👉 Avoid over-leveraging overnight positions

Trade safe in uncertain conditions.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

text.text: ⚠️ YESTERDAY WAS NOT OUR DAY FOR OPTION BUYING ⚠️

text:
Most trades ended in losses as option premiums remained expensive during the starting phase of expiry.

📌 In the initial days of expiry, stock option premiums are usually highly inflated.
Even if the stock moves slightly in the expected direction, option premiums often fail to give meaningful movement unless there is a strong momentum move in the underlying stock.

✅ For the next few sessions, keep position sizing light and focus on strict risk management.

🎯 We will try to provide selective Index Option setups with better risk-reward opportunities and higher probability trades.

Discipline & capital protection remain the top priority. 📊

messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

text.text:
Those who are not able to exit options at market opening can wait for some time and strictly follow stop loss levels.

Do not let panic and volatility turn a good profit into a loss, or a small loss into a big one. Risk management and patience are the key in volatile markets.

This discipline should also be followed in INTRADAY Options Trading.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.
