text.text:
Today, there were a lot of levels due to the sudden upmove in the market, and the market closed on a bullish note. I expect the same trend to continue tomorrow as well.

Regarding the levels, we exited 4-5 trades at cost to protect the capital. It is always better to exit at cost rather than turn a manageable situation into a loss and then wait for the next opportunity. This approach may increase the number of levels, but it will help in controlling unnecessary losses.

For safe traders, it is advisable to stop trading after making profit in the first trade itself.

Thank You 🙏

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.text:
Today was a difficult day in the market. The rupee fell sharply, and because of that the whole market came under pressure. On top of that, some negative news also added to the fall, so overall the day remained weak and unstable.
We understand that the performance today was not good, and we fully take responsibility for that. But this kind of volatility happens in the market sometimes.
We are closely tracking everything and will try to recover in the coming sessions. Please don’t lose trust in us. We are working with full focus to improve things going ahead

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

text.text:
Market conditions are currently not favorable for aggressive Option Buying or Equity trades.
With global markets also under pressure, we are keeping exposure limited and taking only selective setups.
Once the market stabilizes and volatility cools down, we will gradually increase the number of trades.
For now, capital protection remains the priority.

messages.from: SG Options Training Group ( SEBI Registered)
messages.author: KV_Om Sai
messages.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.

text_entities.text:
Trading Guidelines:

  
1. When trading with multiple lots, secure 50% profit on the first target for one lot, and for additional lots, implement a trailing stop loss from the first target. If trading with one lot, secure profit on the first target and then trail.

2. Profit booking should be in decimals with a buffer of 20 paisa. For instance, if the target is 9, place the target order at 8.9.
  
3. Wait for positions to activate; we provide sell below and buy above levels. Allow a buffer of 10 paisa for activation. Avoid trading based solely on levels; wait for the call to activate.
  
4. If an exit message is issued during an ongoing trade, exit immediately, regardless of minor loss or profit. Do not wait for further market movement.

5.  EVERYONE FOLLOW THIS RULE
👉IF TRAILING SL GONE
👉👉EXIT AT COST👈👈
NO MATTER WHAT, DONT HOLD

Note: 
Trading instructions are shared in the morning on a daily basis. If levels are missed, avoid trading and wait for fresh opportunities.

The profit/loss figures mentioned are indicative and based on assumptions. 

Futures: Single Lot
OPTIONS: Single lot
Index: 4-5lots

Stock trading is inherently risky, and you take complete and full responsibility for the outcomes of all trading you do with Stock Gainers, including but not limited to the loss of capital. Please trade according to your risk tolerance.
